name: Bali Spirit Journey
overviewDescription: Seven days through Bali's temples, rice terraces and sacred coastlines — a journey designed for travellers who seek depth over distance.
overviewExtended: We move through Bali slowly and intentionally. Sunrise ceremonies at Besakih, private cooking classes with a Ubud family, evening kecak fire dances and a final dawn ascent of Mount Batur that ends with breakfast above the clouds. Every detail is arranged so you arrive fully present.
itinerary: Day 1: Arrive Seminyak and Welcome;;Private airport transfer to a clifftop villa overlooking the Indian Ocean. Evening purification ceremony with a local Balinese priest at sunset.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1537953391948-e493f61b9ccb?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop;;15:00 Arrival - 17:00 Villa check-in - 19:00 Welcome ceremony;;Alaya Resort Seminyak;;Welcome dinner at Merah Putih|Day 2: Sacred Temple Circuit;;Private guided tour of Tanah Lot at sunrise before the crowds followed by Pura Taman Ayun and a traditional Balinese lunch in Mengwi.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518548419970-58e3b4079ab2?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop;;05:30 Tanah Lot sunrise - 10:00 Taman Ayun - 13:00 Lunch;;Alaya Resort Seminyak;;Breakfast - Traditional Balinese lunch|Day 3: Ubud Rice Terraces and Art Village;;Full day in Ubud — walk the Campuhan Ridge at dawn, visit the Tegalalang rice terraces and attend a private Kecak dance performance in the evening.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1520250497591-112f2f40a3f4?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop;;07:00 Ridge walk - 10:00 Terraces - 19:00 Kecak dance;;Komaneka at Bisma Ubud;;Breakfast - Lunch at Sari Organik|Day 4: Cooking Class and Healer Visit;;Morning spice market walk with your host family, hands-on Balinese cooking class then a private session with a traditional Balinese healer (Balian).;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504674900247-0877df9cc836?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop;;08:00 Market walk - 10:00 Cooking class - 15:00 Healer session;;Komaneka at Bisma Ubud;;Breakfast - Lunch prepared by you|Day 5: Amed and Underwater World;;Drive to Amed on Bali's east coast for sunrise snorkelling over a Japanese WWII shipwreck and vibrant coral gardens teeming with tropical fish.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544551763-46a013bb70d5?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop;;06:00 Depart Ubud - 09:00 Snorkelling - 14:00 Beach leisure;;Amed Beach Resort;;Breakfast - Seafood lunch on the beach|Day 6: Mount Batur Summit and Hot Springs;;Pre-dawn guided trek to the summit of Mount Batur (active volcano) for a sunrise above the clouds. Descend to natural volcanic hot springs for recovery.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1477346611705-65d1883cee1e?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop;;02:00 Depart - 05:30 Summit sunrise - 10:00 Hot springs;;Ubud Valley Villa;;Packed summit breakfast - Hot-spring lunch|Day 7: Farewell and Departure;;Final morning of traditional Balinese spa ritual at your villa — a full-body boreh scrub and flower bath before private transfer to the airport.;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540555700478-4be289fbecef?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop;;Morning spa ritual - 13:00 Airport transfer;;Alaya Resort Seminyak;;Breakfast
sightseeing: Tanah Lot Sunrise;;Private pre-dawn access to Bali's most iconic sea temple before it opens to the public — the sky turns gold as the tide retreats.;;temple_hindu;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518548419970-58e3b4079ab2?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop|Tegalalang Rice Terraces;;Walk through centuries-old terraced paddy fields with a local farmer explaining the subak irrigation system recognised by UNESCO.;;eco;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1520250497591-112f2f40a3f4?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop|Mount Batur Sunrise Trek;;A guided pre-dawn ascent of Bali's sacred volcano culminating in a 360 degree sunrise panorama above the clouds — a defining life experience.;;landscape;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1477346611705-65d1883cee1e?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop|Kecak Fire Dance;;An evening open-air performance of the ancient Ramayana epic performed by a chorus of 50 men by torchlight at Uluwatu cliff temple.;;theater_comedy;;https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1537996194471-e657df975ab4?q=80&w=2038&auto=format&fit=crop
testimonials: The Mount Batur sunrise was the single most beautiful thing I have ever witnessed. Standing above the clouds on an active volcano as the sun rises over Lombok — I was completely speechless.;;PRIYA R. - Mumbai|Seven days felt like seven weeks in the best possible way. The healer session on Day 4 was unexpectedly profound. Our guide Wayan is extraordinary — deeply knowledgeable and completely warm.;;THOMAS H. - London
